twitter_thread: I've seen 42% of development time wasted on avoidable errors. Fixing 3 common mistakes can change this.
Git reduces errors by 32% in version control, while SVN reduces them by 17%. Choose wisely.
Jest automated testing cuts debugging time from 10 hours to 4.5 hours per week.
A poorly designed login form can increase user frustration by 57%. Figma can help you get it right.
Top 3 software frustration causes: poor documentation (41%), inadequate testing (31%), inefficient workflows (28%).
Trello streamlines workflows, reducing frustration by 27% and saving 5 hours/week per team member.
What's the most frustrating software issue you've faced and how did you resolve it? #lessfrustrating #software
